methodsAttempted.query: site:hacettepe.edu.tr (ChatGPT OR "generative AI" OR "yapay zeka" OR "üretken yapay zeka" OR "Artificial Intelligence") (policy OR yönerge OR rehber OR etik OR akademik dürüstlük OR sınav OR plagiarism) Hacettepe
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned the official Hacettepe generative AI policy PDF hosted by the Ataturk Institute domain, an official YDYO generative AI coordination page, and other lower-scope or publication-related Hacettepe pages.
Robots.txt permits the directly discovered PDF path; the PDF was fetched successfully with HTTP 200 and parsed for Turkish text.
The official YDYO page contains school-level generative AI policy and guide links, so it was recorded as limited context and not used for university-wide claims.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a university-wide Hacettepe PDF titled 'Eğitim ve Öğretim Süreçlerinde Üretken Yapay Zeka Kullanım Politikası' and one school-level YDYO generative AI page. Claims are drawn only from the university-wide PDF.

Official Hacettepe School of Foreign Languages page; relevant but unit-scoped, so not used as evidence for university-wide policy claims.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Yabancı Diller Yüksekokulu Üretken Yapay Zekâ (ÜYZ) Politikası yönetim, öğretim elemanları ve öğrenciler için akademik, pedagojik, etik, adil ve çevresel sorumluluk içeren bir kullanım çerçevesi sunmaktadır.
artifacts.notes: The page is official and AI-policy-specific, but it is scoped to Yabancı Diller Yüksekokulu rather than the whole university.

stopConditions: Stop after a verified university-wide official source yields citation-ready evidence for generative AI use in education.
Do not use unit-scoped Hacettepe pages for university-wide claims.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a staged candidate because the claim is limited to the existence and scope of an official Hacettepe generative AI education policy/guide.
Approved as a staged candidate because the claim closely follows the student guidance wording and avoids converting 'should' into a stronger mandate.
Approved as a staged candidate because the claim preserves the source's modal language that unauthorized use may be cheating and may cause academic misuse.

artifacts.title: Hacettepe University Generative AI Education Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: A university-wide official Hacettepe PDF provides Turkish evidence for generative AI use in education within a legal, ethical, conscious, and responsible-use framework, student responsible-use expectations, and academic-integrity risk for unauthorized use. A YDYO unit page was found but excluded from university-wide claims because it is school-scoped.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged claims rely on one official Turkish PDF and should not be read as a complete inventory of all Hacettepe unit-level generative AI materials.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
